articles.title: Ebola recoveries bring signs of hope in DRC as suspected cases emerge outside Africa - CNN
articles.description: Four nurses who were being treated for ‌Ebola caused by the Bundibugyo strain of the virus have been discharged from a hospital in Bunia in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) after recovering from the disease, the World Health Organization (WHO) said on S…
